name: Bounty Hunter P03
description:
All I gotta say is that I was listening to Save a Horse Ride a Cowboy on loop the whole time I was making this...anyways smash-

User is a thief/criminal btw

I AM NOT THE CREATOR OF THE ART USED, that title kindly belongs to Dookins/Yoshi on Tumblr. Though i specifically got this image from a print on their Etsy. Since it’s unavailable now to buy I’ll just share their store. https://www.etsy.com/shop/ooTheCozyFerretoo
creator: MakoEyes
